headlines.headline: Sources: De'Anthony Melton returns to Warriors on 2-year deal
headlines.description: Free agent guard De'Anthony Melton has agreed to a two-year, $11 million deal to return to the Golden State Warriors, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania.

headlines.headline: Calais Campbell's mother found dead, brother charged with murder
headlines.description: The brother of Ravens defensive lineman Calais Campbell has been charged with murder after police found their 71-year-old mother dead at a home in Atlanta during a welfare check.

headlines.headline: NHL free agency 2026: Grades, fits for all the big signings
headlines.description: With free agency underway, we're handing out marks for all of the big deals around the league.

headlines.headline: Source: Jaden Schwartz signs three-year deal with Avalanche
headlines.description: Veteran forward Jaden Schwartz on Wednesday signed a three-year contract worth $3.25 million annually with the Avalanche, a source told ESPN, as Colorado adds a 34-year-old winger who won the Stanley Cup with the St. Louis Blues back in 2019.

headlines.headline: Sources: Arvidsson agrees to two-year $5M deal with Red Wings
headlines.description: The Detroit Red Wings are close to signing Viktor Arvidsson to a two-year deal after his 25-goal campaign with the Boston Bruins last season.

headlines.headline: Nico Hischier signs Devils' five-year contract extension
headlines.description: Captain Nico Hischier, 27, who is entering his 10th NHL season, has signed a five-year contract extension with the New Jersey Devils worth $58.5 million, the team announced on Wednesday, ending speculation about his future with the club that drafted him.
